original_image_tags: A "RESTRICTED" stamp is visible in the lower right corner.

elements.description: A scanned document page containing a typed checklist titled 'RESTRICTED CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS'. The page includes numbered fields (1-26) with typed responses regarding an observation on 8 April 1948. It features two stamped or stenciled 'RESTRICTED' labels: one at the top center and one at the bottom right. Two circular punch holes are visible on the left margin. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or maps are present.

judge.reason: Description A claims a 'RESTRICTED' stamp is in the lower right, while Description B states there is no visual content, only typed text and stamps as part of the document structure, creating a direct contradiction on the presence of any visual element.
